business.name: KAPELES Heating and Plumbing Services
business.tagline: Reliable Heating and Plumbing You Can Trust

sample_reviews.author: James Holloway
sample_reviews.text: Kapeles sorted our boiler issue quickly and professionally. Arrived on time, diagnosed the problem fast and had it fixed within the hour. Highly recommended.

sample_reviews.author: Sarah Patel
sample_reviews.text: Fantastic service from start to finish. Very knowledgeable and tidied up after themselves. Will definitely be using again for our annual boiler service.

sample_reviews.author: Mark Griffiths
sample_reviews.text: Called them out for an emergency leak late in the day and they still came out promptly. Fair pricing and honest advice. Good local company.

brand.usp: Kapeles Heating and Plumbing Services brings dependable, expert heating and plumbing solutions to Birmingham and the surrounding areas. We pride ourselves on prompt response times, transparent pricing, and quality workmanship every time.
brand.hero_headline: Birmingham's Trusted Heating and Plumbing Experts
brand.about_paragraph: I'm the founder of Kapeles Heating and Plumbing Services, and I've been keeping Birmingham homes warm and running smoothly for years. We specialise in boiler installations, central heating, and emergency plumbing, delivering honest advice and quality results on every job. Our customers come back to us because we treat every home like our own.
